user_scenarios.user_goal: As an operator, open the local Loop Dashboard, select loop runs, inspect task and agent summaries, view the visual flow, filter logs, and confirm completed runs are visible.
prerequisites: FastAPI and Playwright for Python are available.
The evaluator creates temporary loop-run fixture data and does not mutate real project artifacts.
steps: Create fixture loop runs covering active repair, passed_waiting_human_merge, stopped_no_action, stopped_budget, and stopped_blocked states.
Start the dashboard backend against the temporary fixture project root.
Open the dashboard in a browser.
Click the active run and verify task description, phase, next action, agent cards, blocked diagnostics, and flow diagram.
Filter logs by stderr and by keyword.
Click completed runs and verify their terminal states remain visible.
Check a mobile-width viewport for horizontal overflow.
expected_outcomes: The dashboard page renders in Chinese.
Run selection updates detail, flow diagram, agent cards, logs, and diagnostics.
Log text is redacted before display.
A 390px-wide viewport has no horizontal document overflow.
The evaluator writes result.json with status pass.
failure_signals: The frontend reports failed to fetch.
Clicking a run does not update detail.
Planner, Generator, or Evaluator summaries are missing.
Log filtering does not change visible entries.
cleanup: Remove temporary fixture directories after writing evaluator evidence.
